mapper.insert: INSERT INTO articles (title, content, author_id, status, submitted_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{status}, #{submittedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u1.username as authorName, u2.username as reviewerName FROM articles a LEFT JOIN users u1 ON a.author_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON a.reviewed_by = u2.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE articles SET status = #{status}, reviewed_at = NOW(), reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
